title: Optimism over the demand
summary:
Main
The Baltic Dry Index remained in the red yesterday as all vessel segments retreated amid soft demand in the major basins. Optimism over the demand outlook fuelled significant gains for iron ore and coal, while disappointing manufacturing data for the US and China weighed on crude oil and copper prices. By Ulf Bergman
Macro/Geopolitics
As widely expected, the Federal Reserve left interest rates unchanged on Wednesday.
